title: Yuukan Club
synopsis: St. President school is one of the most prestigious schools around. Everybody in this school respects the Yuukan club, the richest and most popular group. Its members - Bidou Granmarnier, Shouchikubai Miroku, Kenbishi Yuuri, Kikumasamune Seishirou, Hakushika Noriko and Kizakura Karen - go through dangerous adventures to save their schoolmates and, of course, to kill time.

title: Xuese Cangqiong
synopsis: Li Mingyang was originally an ordinary office worker. Because of a strange QR code, he was trapped in a killing city. Here everyone is forced to participate in a survival game that is going to kill or be killed. In the process of finding a way out of the city, the mastermind behind the whole incident surfaced step by step.

title: Combining Squadron Mechander Robo
titleNative: 合身戦隊メカンダーロボ
synopsis: The Doron Empire from the Ganymede System discovered Earth as an ideal world for them to conquer. The interest of expanding the empire came as a result of the power-hungry General Ozmel who overthrew the current reigning Queen Medusa of the Ganymede System as a start of their universal conquest. Almost completely succumbed to the empire, Earth is at its last days, and one scientist, Dr. Shikishima, had only one hope in restoring Earth from its alien conquerors--- a massive mecha known as the Mechander Robo, specially programmed and designed to battle these invading aliens from complete takeover of Earth. Along with this awesome fighter machine, Dr. Shikishima also recruited three pilots to be placed behind the Mechander Robo's controls--- the mysterious Jimmy Orion, the scientist's son Ryosuke Shikishima, and Kojiro Hachijima. Although the primary storyline is Earth battling the Doron Empire, there is something within lead pliot Jimmy Orion's past that was somewhat connected towards th

synopsis: Based on Akagawa Jirou's popular book series about hapless detective Katayama Yoshitaro who lives with his sister Harumi and their cat Holmes, which has a sixth sense when it comes to solve mysteries. In this stand alone OVA the aftershow party of Harumi's acting troupe becomes the showplace of murder and tragedy. Luckily Yoshitaro brought Holmes along. (Source: AniDB)

title: Ni Zai Xingguang Shenchu
synonyms: Ni Zai Xing Guang Shen Chu
synopsis: Will the starlight twinkling between the fingers cause harm, or is it a warm embrace? Xi Bai and his close friend Chunchun Liu suffered a bizarre car accident. The assistant Zhuo Han who appeared afterwards was actually a personal bodyguard with mysterious abilities. A famous gallery invited Chunchun Liu to open a painting exhibition with excellent conditions. The bodyguard Yuanchen Wang, who appeared afterwards, seemed to have a mysterious past. With danger lurking on every side of these four men and the exhibition approaching, the truth behind it all slowly begins to surface... (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Moonlight Pierce
titleRomaji: Gekkou no Pierce: Yumemi to Gin no Bara no Kishidan
titleNative: 月光のピアス―ユメミと銀のバラ騎士団
synopsis: Because of a mysterious earring, Yumemi a young japanese student, becomes involved in a mysterious story. She must go to Germany, where she learns that the spirit of an evil prince is haunting her earring...

title: The Land of NOMO
synopsis: Once upon a time, there was a girl named “Sora”. She loved to sing, but one day, something happened that made her scared to sing in front of others. As days passed, she forgot how to sing, and even how to laugh. Then, one day, she and her little brother “Daichi” stumbled upon a mysterious pond. At a pond called “Kagamiike”: Mirror Pond, Sora discovered a mystical butterfly glowing with aurora colors. As she watched it flutter freely, she suddenly felt a connection. The butterfly’s magical glow seemed to resonate with something deep inside her. Unable to resist, Sora reached out toward the butterfly. But she lost her balance and tumbled headfirst into the pond. Daichi, trying to help her, ended up falling in too... Beyond the surface of the Mirror Pond, a world of wonder and mystery awaited. However, he learns about an alarming monster attack on a young woman near his house, a photograph of which shows the monster to bear a resemblance to the monster he designed. Why is the world of his mobile game appearing in real life?

synopsis: Yuxi who was discriminated against based on her looks goes to a plastic surgery clinic for a consultation, giving into the tempting proposal when Huantao, the handsome director, steps in and tells her, "I'll make you beautiful." titleNative: 旅途危机！圣芙蕾雅号特别事件
synopsis: This is the much-anticipated perfect vacation for everyone. On the luxurious spaceship, St. Freya, heading towards the moon, we believed we could enjoy this rare and relaxing journey to the fullest — or so we thought.
